scripts.db:migrate: infisical run --env=dev -- pnpm exec drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.docker:migrate: infisical run --env=dev -- docker compose run --rm migrator
scripts.docker:up: infisical run --env=dev -- docker compose up -d migrator coordinator website && echo '[note] runners are profile-gated; use pnpm run docker:up:full for a full local stack (see README.md).'
scripts.docker:up:full: pnpm run docker:up && pnpm run dev:seed-runners && docker compose --profile runners up -d runner runner-2
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:tsc && pnpm run lint:next
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @easyshell/coordinator run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @easyshell/runner run test:coverage
